description_preview: The 423 is a simple three ball pattern made up of alternating Two-in-ones from each hand. While not a particularly interesting or impressive pattern on its own, the 423 siteswap is the foundation of many dynamic tricks,…

title: Cascade
description_preview: The Three Ball Cascade is the most basic juggling pattern, and the first trick any would-be juggler should learn. The Cascade is generally considered to be the easiest pattern, and forms the backbone of many other…

title: Fake Columns
description_preview: The Fake Columns is a variation of Columns (or more accurately the Two-in-one) in which one outer ball is moved by hand along the same horizontal level as the other. This creates a very cool effect, especially when used…

title: Juggler's Tennis

title: Oy-Oy
description_preview: The Oy-Oy is variation of the Yo-Yo in which an outside ball is carried underneath, instead of above, the center ball. The Oy-Oy is slightly more difficult than the Yo-Yo, however once you have learned the latter this…

title: The W
description_preview: The W, also known as the Columns 423, is a variation of the 423 in which each ball is thrown along the same vertical path, with you hands moving between the outside and inside balls. This pattern is not particularly…

title: Yo-Yo

title: Columns

title: Columns: Overthrow Variation

title: Factory

title: Fake Mess
description_preview: The Fake Mess is a variation of the 423 in which the pattern is distorted into looking like Mills Mess. This is achieved by crossing and uncrossing a static ball underneath your other arm during each cycle. The Fake…

title: Half-Shower
description_preview: The Half-Shower is one of the first asymmetrical (one hand does one thing and the other other hand does something else) patterns jugglers learn. It is called the Half-Shower because it bears resemblance to the Shower…

title: Infinity
description_preview: The Infinity is a variation of Columns in which the center ball, rather than just traveling up and down, is thrown through the two outside balls in a sideways figure-eight pattern (hence the name). Like many of the…

title: Rainbow Cross

title: Reverse Infinity
description_preview: The Reverse Infinity is, as it sounds, a time reversed variation of the Infinity. The trick is essentially just Columns with the center ball thrown from the outside such that it will travel between the two vertical…

title: Shuffle-Switch
description_preview: The Shuffle-Switch is a variation of Columns where you do a rapid double-pass of the outside balls between hands, before tossing them up. This is one of the more difficult variations, with the high speed…

title: 441 (Half-Box)

title: Al's Slide

title: Buffalo Shuffle
description_preview: The Buffalo Shuffle is a variation of the Georgian Shuffle in which the multiplex is thrown under the arm, followed by two claw catches in quick succession. This gives the pattern a rushed feeling when juggled,…

title: Burke's Barrage

title: Chops

title: Crossed-Arm Cascade

title: Crossed-Arm Reverse Cascade

title: Crossunder
description_preview: The Crossunder is a variation of Columns in which the simultaneous vertical throws are made with your arms crossed. This adds another layer of complexity and makes for a more interesting—and difficult—pattern. Before…

title: Davenport Shuffle

title: High-Low Cascade

title: Reverse Factory

title: Weave

title: Inverted Shower

The 552 is a four ball pattern in which each hand makes an uninterrupted pair of Cascade-like throws. This gives the pattern an odd asymmetrical-yet-symmetrical feel which separates it from other four ball tricks. The…

The 5551 is an asymmetric four ball pattern in which three normal Cascade throws are followed by a quick horizontal pass. The speed of this pattern closely matches that of the Five Ball Cascade; as such it is most often…

title: Four Ball Columns
description_preview: Four Ball Columns is a four ball variation of Columns, such that two balls are always thrown vertically inside, and two are always thrown vertically outside. Once you are familiar with the Synchronous Fountain, Four…

title: Lisa

title: Wimpy

title: Four Ball Half-Shower

title: Tennessee Waltz

title: Four Ball Shower

title: Four Ball Stacked Box

title: Pistons

title: Synchronous Fountain

title: Tsunami

title: Five Ball Split Multiplex Cascade

title: Martin

title: Five Ball Stacked Multiplex Cascade

title: Five Ball Cascade

title: Five Ball Half-Shower

title: Five Ball Reverse Cascade

title: Five Ball Shower

title: Six Ball Fountain
